office-comeback.title: 职场
office-comeback.tagline: 甩锅、越界、拖进度、装专业时，办公室里该怎么带刺回去。
office-comeback.intro: 适合开会、协作、汇报、交接、甩锅、拖延这些办公室高频摩擦场景。

sections.title: 骂人短句
sections.description: 适合正面开怼、直接顶回去的短句。

sections.title: 冷嘲热讽
sections.description: 适合阴阳怪气、反讽、带刺输出的短句。

sections.title: 补刀短句
sections.description: 适合打断、堵嘴、让对方闭环的短句。

entries.english: You turn every project handoff into a delayed mess.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次项目交接都搞成一场延期烂摊子。

entries.english: This is not a suggestion. It is a basic requirement.
entries.chinese: 这不是建议，这是基本要求。

entries.english: Amazing. Another project handoff ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把项目交接搞砸了。

entries.english: Straighten out your logic before you try to report up.
entries.chinese: 汇报之前，至少先把逻辑理顺。

entries.english: Save it. Your 甩锅说法 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套甩锅说法跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that confidently unprepared somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的没准备还很自信去别处。

entries.english: You turn every meeting update into a longer problem.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次会议汇报都搞成一个被拉长的问题。

entries.english: You make meeting update look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把会议汇报搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Bold of you to be that vaguely professional with results like this.
entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么模糊装专业，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 官话套话 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套官话套话，去找个更有耐心的人听。

entries.english: You turn every deadline into someone else’s emergency.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次截止时间都搞成别人的紧急任务。

entries.english: You make deadline look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把截止时间搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Amazing. Another deadline ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把截止时间搞砸了。

entries.english: Right, because your deadline is always such a success story.
entries.chinese: 对，毕竟你的截止时间一直都是“成功案例”。

entries.english: Save it. Your 延期借口 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套延期借口跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that casually irresponsible somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的不负责得很随意去别处。

entries.english: You turn every status report into guesswork with bullet points.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次进度报告都搞成加了项目符号的瞎猜。

entries.english: You make status report look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把进度报告搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Bold of you to be that fake-efficient with results like this.
entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么假装高效，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 进度表演 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套进度表演，去找个更有耐心的人听。

entries.english: You turn every feedback round into a blame session.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次反馈轮次都搞成一场甩锅会。

entries.english: You make feedback round look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把反馈轮次搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Amazing. Another feedback round ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把反馈轮次搞砸了。

entries.english: Right, because your feedback round is always such a success story.
entries.chinese: 对，毕竟你的反馈轮次一直都是“成功案例”。

entries.english: Save it. Your 推责语气 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套推责语气跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that allergic to accountability somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的对负责过敏去别处。

entries.english: You turn every client call into a credibility leak.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次客户电话都搞成一场信誉漏水。

entries.english: You make client call look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把客户电话搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Bold of you to be that loudly underqualified with results like this.
entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么能力不够还声音很大，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 场面话 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套场面话，去找个更有耐心的人听。

entries.english: You turn every task breakdown into confusion with formatting.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次任务拆分都搞成排版精致的混乱。

entries.english: You make task breakdown look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把任务拆分搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Amazing. Another task breakdown ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把任务拆分搞砸了。

entries.english: Right, because your task breakdown is always such a success story.
entries.chinese: 对，毕竟你的任务拆分一直都是“成功案例”。

entries.english: Save it. Your 流程腔 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套流程腔跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that organized-looking only somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的只会表面整齐去别处。

entries.english: You turn every follow-up email into extra noise.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次跟进邮件都搞成额外噪音。

entries.english: You make follow-up email look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把跟进邮件搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Bold of you to be that passive-aggressive with results like this.
entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么阴阳怪气，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 邮件腔调 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套邮件腔调，去找个更有耐心的人听。

entries.english: You turn every last-minute request into a time theft.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次临时需求都搞成偷时间行为。

entries.english: You make last-minute request look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把临时需求搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Amazing. Another last-minute request ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把临时需求搞砸了。

entries.english: Right, because your last-minute request is always such a success story.
entries.chinese: 对，毕竟你的临时需求一直都是“成功案例”。

entries.english: Save it. Your 加塞话术 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套加塞话术跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that boundary-blind somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的完全没边界感去别处。

entries.english: You turn every team collaboration into solo damage at scale.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次团队协作都搞成放大型单人破坏。

entries.english: You make team collaboration look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把团队协作搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Bold of you to be that professionally exhausting with results like this.
entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么职业化消耗别人，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 协作废话 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套协作废话，去找个更有耐心的人听。

campus-snark.title: 校园
campus-snark.tagline: 课堂、小组作业、社团、宿舍、考试周，这些场景里的讽刺和回怼全整理出来。
campus-snark.intro: 适合课堂抬杠、小组划水、社团画饼、宿舍惹事、考试周互相烦人的时候。

sections.title: 冷嘲热讽

entries.english: You turn every group project into a solo rescue mission.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次小组作业都搞成单人救火现场。

entries.english: This is not effort. This is you performing for yourself.
entries.chinese: 你这不是努力，你这是感动自己。

entries.english: Amazing. Another group project ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把小组作业搞砸了。

entries.english: Right, because your group project is always such a success story.
entries.chinese: 对，毕竟你的小组作业一直都是“成功案例”。

entries.english: Save it. Your 划水借口 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套划水借口跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that proudly useless somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的没贡献还挺骄傲去别处。

entries.english: You turn every class discussion into background noise.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次课堂讨论都搞成背景噪音。

entries.english: You make class discussion look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把课堂讨论搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Bold of you to be that loud without substance with results like this.
entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么只会大声没内容，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 课堂发言腔 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套课堂发言腔，去找个更有耐心的人听。

entries.english: You turn every attendance check into a drama performance.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次点名都搞成一场戏。

entries.english: You make attendance check look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把点名搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Amazing. Another attendance check ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把点名搞砸了。

entries.english: Right, because your attendance check is always such a success story.
entries.chinese: 对，毕竟你的点名一直都是“成功案例”。

entries.english: Save it. Your 缺勤说辞 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套缺勤说辞跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that casually shameless somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的脸不红心不跳去别处。

entries.english: You turn every exam review into panic with stationery.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次考前复习都搞成拿着文具的恐慌。

entries.english: You make exam review look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把考前复习搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Bold of you to be that dramatically unprepared with results like this.
entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么没准备还要演，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 临时抱佛脚发言 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套临时抱佛脚发言，去找个更有耐心的人听。

entries.english: You turn every lab report into formatted confusion.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次实验报告都搞成格式完整的混乱。

entries.english: You make lab report look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把实验报告搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Amazing. Another lab report ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把实验报告搞砸了。

entries.english: Right, because your lab report is always such a success story.
entries.chinese: 对，毕竟你的实验报告一直都是“成功案例”。

entries.english: Save it. Your 实验室套话 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套实验室套话跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that confidently wrong somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的错得很自信去别处。

entries.english: You turn every dorm room rule into something optional to you.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次宿舍规矩都搞成像只对别人有效。

entries.english: You make dorm room rule look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把宿舍规矩搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Bold of you to be that boundary-free with results like this.
entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么完全没边界感，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 宿舍借口 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套宿舍借口，去找个更有耐心的人听。

entries.english: You turn every club planning into a promise factory.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次社团策划都搞成空话工厂。

entries.english: You make club planning look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把社团策划搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Amazing. Another club planning ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把社团策划搞砸了。

entries.english: Right, because your club planning is always such a success story.
entries.chinese: 对，毕竟你的社团策划一直都是“成功案例”。

entries.english: Save it. Your 社团官话 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套社团官话跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that good at promising somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的只会画饼去别处。

entries.english: You turn every library silence into a suggestion you ignore.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次图书馆安静都搞成一个你自动忽略的建议。

entries.english: You make library silence look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把图书馆安静搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Bold of you to be that annoyingly oblivious with results like this.
entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么吵而不自知，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 打扰别人那套 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套打扰别人那套，去找个更有耐心的人听。

entries.english: You turn every presentation slide into a public apology waiting to happen.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次汇报幻灯片都搞成一场等着现场道歉的事故。

entries.english: You make presentation slide look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把汇报幻灯片搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Amazing. Another presentation slide ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把汇报幻灯片搞砸了。

entries.english: Right, because your presentation slide is always such a success story.
entries.chinese: 对，毕竟你的汇报幻灯片一直都是“成功案例”。

entries.english: Save it. Your 展示说辞 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套展示说辞跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that underprepared and proud somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的没准备还很得意去别处。

entries.english: You turn every campus rumor into your whole personality.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次校园八卦都搞成你的主要人格组成。

entries.english: You make campus rumor look harder than it is.
entries.chinese: 你能把校园八卦搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.english: Bold of you to be that nosy and excited with results like this.
entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么爱打听还很兴奋，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 打听口吻 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套打听口吻，去找个更有耐心的人听。

cafeteria-chaos.title: 食堂
cafeteria-chaos.tagline: 排队、抢位、插队、点评别人吃什么，这些食堂场景里的火气全归档。
cafeteria-chaos.intro: 适合食堂排队、窗口点餐、抢座位、评论别人餐盘、插队、蹭桌这些高频摩擦场景。

entries.english: You turn every lunch line into a test of public patience.
entries.chinese: 你能把每次午饭排队都搞成公共耐心测试。

entries.english: Stop shaking that spoon. At this rate it is going to be all soup.
entries.chinese: 阿姨手别抖了，再抖就只剩汤了。

entries.english: Amazing. Another lunch line ruined right on schedule.
entries.chinese: 厉害，又一次准时把午饭排队搞砸了。

entries.english: Right, because your lunch line is always such a success story.
entries.chinese: 对，毕竟你的午饭排队一直都是“成功案例”。

entries.english: Save it. Your 插队理由 is not my problem.
entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套插队理由跟我没关系。

entries.english: Take that line-cutting somewhere else.
entries.chinese: 带着你的插队成性去别处。

entries.english: You turn every tray handling into a hazard zone.

entries.chinese: 你能把端餐盘搞得比它本来难十倍。

entries.chinese: 都这种结果了，你还敢这么冒失到离谱，脸皮是真厚。

entries.english: Try that 手滑借口 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套手滑借口，去找个更有耐心的人听。

entries.english: Try that 点评口吻 on someone more patient.
entries.chinese: 你这套点评口吻，去找个更有耐心的人听。

entries.chinese: 你能把每次吃饭礼貌都搞成对周围人的持续伤害。

entries.chinese: 省省吧，你这套磨蹭说辞跟我没关系。

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about running your mouth without backing it up.
entries.chinese: 你妈带你逛街，别人都问：大姐，你这猴多少钱买的。

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about turning a small situation into a spectacle.
entries.chinese: 你个溅B，破鞋，你溅得嘴里长痔疮，你爹我已经把你B草烂了，你怎么还在大街上卖B，滚回家把你妈叫出来给大家草草

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about making yourself look ridiculous in public.

entries.chinese: 你妈生你时是不是把人扔了把胎盘养大

entries.chinese: 别老成天日日日的，你丫的，性饥渴了去找隔壁的旺财啊

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about behaving like conflict is a performance.
entries.chinese: 你生儿子没屁眼，老爸卖屁眼，你自己烂屁眼，爱吃鸡屁眼

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about making a scene instead of making sense.
entries.chinese: 你父亲可能有无数个，我忍不住笑了出来，不好意思控制不住。别再想起你那悲惨的母亲了

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about causing chaos and acting reckless.
entries.chinese: 母亲有一块三角形的地，已经荒废了几十年。不是让你去那里放牛和羊喝水，而是等待我去耕种那片田地

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about running your mouth without backing it up.
entries.chinese: 我有一根金箍棒，你妈每天都在想；还有一柄不倒枪，弄的你妈直叫爽

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about turning a small situation into a spectacle.
entries.chinese: 你爸爸外号小旋风，床上不到3分钟，你妈晚上冲冲冲，搞了一天都不松

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about making yourself look ridiculous in public.
entries.chinese: 咋滴你管那么多呢？收粪车从你家门前路过你都要拿勺子尝尝咸淡？

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about bringing mess and embarrassment everywhere.
entries.chinese: 来糙你妈的大黑B，你父亲我用根牙签就把她的荫道扎出血水喷泉了

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about acting loud while adding nothing useful.
entries.chinese: 你父亲十分有条不絮的正在糙你狗娘的大胸脯，已经摩擦出静电反应了，眼睁睁的看着你娘被我干成核电发电站为地球提供新能源了

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about doubling down on behavior that looks worse by the second.
entries.chinese: 废物儿子还你妈戒烟呢，你看看你焦黄的牙齿溃烂的口腔，一看就是把大前门当成再生父母的穷狗儿子，儿子你母亲被爸爸送进动物园，被大星星强硬的塞进你母亲樱桃小嘴里抽动

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about mistaking noise for pressure and attitude for power.
entries.chinese: 伏特加？你父亲不会那么铺张浪费，只会用一个印有“福尔马林”的高级药水涂抹在你妈的B里做润滑作用

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about pulling other people into a pointless mess.
entries.chinese: 你妈的大黑B就是一个生态乐园，里面居然住着猛犸大象还有霸王龙喜庆极了，没有错侏罗纪公园是在你妈的B里拍摄完成的

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about behaving like conflict is a performance.
entries.chinese: 小卡？你爹把银行卡往你妈的B里刷个几百万成为了银行杀手是真的，你妈的B里不断的吐钱，最后整个城市被你妈下体里分泌出来的金钱淹没

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about looking bold while your behavior falls apart.
entries.chinese: 日本人为什么那么丧心病狂呢？据说是因为你妈主动提出要给他们当人肉厕所的要求，难怪好色的日本人一下把你妈搂入了怀中享不尽的天伦之乐

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about making a scene instead of making sense.
entries.chinese: 什么钱不钱的，你妈出去卖她的B就能挣钱，凭自己的劳动挣钱，她无疑是伟大的劳动妇女顶天立地

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about causing chaos and acting reckless.
entries.chinese: 看到你的脸，就觉得你爸妈在制造你的时候没认真

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about running your mouth without backing it up.
entries.chinese: 话说你妈被我干出子宫癌了，赶快送你妈去看看兽医吧！到晚期就治不好了

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about turning a small situation into a spectacle.
entries.chinese: 话说你妈被我操得大小便失禁了，现在正在兽医院疗养呢！赶紧爬到兽医院看望你妈吧

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about making yourself look ridiculous in public.
entries.chinese: 你大舅妈被我日得满逼长痔疮，你二姨夫的老二被我啃得只剩下海绵体，你三叔公的阴毛被我薅得精光，你四舅妈的逼被我杵得直淌淫液，你五爷的鸡鸡被我掐得邦邦硬，你六爷的睾丸被我捏得粉碎，你七姑被我插得大小便失禁，你八姑奶的逼被我用针线缝得严严实实，你九娘的奶头被我咬得直淌掺着血的乳，你十舅姥被我干得脱了肛。

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about bringing mess and embarrassment everywhere.
entries.chinese: 还犀利呢，你父亲我连二成功力不到就把你妈的B玩出桃花潭水深千尺了你信吗

entries.english: High-pressure mother-insult rant line about acting loud while adding nothing useful.
entries.chinese: 你妈的B里住着一只大熊猫，吃着竹子喝着水，我每天都用棍子喂饱她
